ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the dataset */,
  "data_size" INTEGER /* The size of the dataset in bytes */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* The format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* The source from which the dataset was obtained */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* A flag indicating whether the dataset is private (1) or public (0) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the result belongs to */,
  "analysis_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis type performed */,
  "raw_value" REAL /* Raw value of the analysis */,
  "cumulative_value" REAL /* Cumulative value of the analysis */,
  "logistic_value" REAL /* Logistic value of the analysis */,
  "fractional_area" REAL /* Fractional area of the analysis */,
  "training_omission" REAL /* Training omission value of the analysis */,
  "test_omission" REAL /* Test omission value of the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* The date when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_status" TEXT /* The status of the analysis (e.g., completed, in progress, failed) */,
  "result_file_path" TEXT /* The path to the file containing the analysis results (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_analysis_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_type_id") REFERENCES analysis_types ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* The user's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* The user's last name */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The user's phone number */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* A flag indicating whether the user account is active (1) or inactive (0) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_types" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis type */,
  "analysis_name" TEXT /* Name of the analysis type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the analysis type */,
  "is_advanced" INTEGER /* A flag indicating whether the analysis type is advanced (1) or basic (0) */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* The specific algorithm used for the analysis (e.g., logistic regression, decision tree) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_request" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the request */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis type requested */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being analyzed */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the analysis request (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* The priority level of the request (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "estimated_completion_date" TEXT /* The estimated date of completion for the analysis */,
  "actual_completion_date" TEXT /* The actual date of completion for the analysis */,
  "result_file_path" TEXT /* The path to the file containing the analysis results (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_request_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_request_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analysis_types ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_request_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis request the report belongs to */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* The type of report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* The format of the report (e.g., PDF, HTML) */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* The user who generated the report */,
  "is_confidential" INTEGER /* A flag indicating whether the report is confidential (1) or not (0) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES analysis_request ("request_id")
)
